linting.notes: Linting via make lint runs all three commands. Flake8 configured with max-line-length=120, excludes __init__.py and some component directories. Validated successfully - all commands pass with exit code 0.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses pytest fixtures and requests-mock for HTTP mocking
testing.notes: Tests exist in subdirectories (artifactory-connector, kfp-example-components-connector, mlx-connector) but require the Elyra package to run. Tests are NOT run in CI. Each connector is independent and must be installed separately. Tests cannot run without 'elyra' package dependency.

ci.notes: CI runs on push and pull_request to main branch. Tests Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10 on ubuntu-latest. Only linting is gated - no tests are run in CI.

build.build_command: N/A - repository contains examples and independent connectors, not a single installable package
build.notes: This is an examples repository. Each component-catalog-connector has its own setup.py and can be installed independently with 'pip install -e .' Individual connectors depend on the elyra package.

conventions.test_naming: pytest style - test classes (Test*) with test methods (test_*)
conventions.import_style: Absolute imports, grouped (standard lib, third-party, local)
conventions.notes: Jupyter notebooks in pipelines/ and binder/ directories. Python scripts for pipeline components. Connector code follows standard Python package structure.

lint_commands.notes: Exit code 0 - no lint errors in binder notebooks
Exit code 0 - no lint errors in pipeline notebooks
Exit code 0 - runs all three lint commands successfully

test_commands.command: cd component-catalog-connectors/artifactory-connector && pip install -r test_requirements.txt && pip install -e . && python -m pytest tests/ -v
test_commands.notes: Exit code 2 - ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'elyra'. Tests require the Elyra package to run, which is an external dependency not included in test_requirements.txt. Tests cannot be validated without infrastructure.

container_recipe.notes: Lint commands work perfectly in isolation. Tests require the elyra package which has many dependencies. Each connector must be tested independently after installing both the connector and the elyra package.

validation.summary: Linting validated successfully (4/4 commands pass). Tests cannot run without external Elyra package dependency.

gaps: Tests exist but are not run in CI workflow
Tests require external 'elyra' package dependency not specified in test_requirements.txt
No test command in root Makefile
No coverage configuration or threshold defined
Individual connectors must be installed and tested separately - no monolithic test suite
Some component connector directories have tests, others do not (airflow-example-components-connector has no tests/ directory)
No documentation on how to run tests or install required dependencies
Python version compatibility not specified in setup.py or pyproject.toml at root level
